title: Apple 承認降低舊款 iphone 速度

replies.msg:
https://www.cnet.com/news/apple-slows-down-older-iphone-battery-issues/

Apple on Wednesday said a software feature released last year makes your phone operate more slowly to offset problems with its aging lithium ion battery.

冇邏輯先會信係為左電量，為左用家

成部電話最耗電就係開moon，當你做一樣野就兩秒變三秒或以上，咁你著個moon時間長左=冇慳過電，降頻mode降頻rom，an撚大把試過，最後根本慳唔到d乜春純粹拖低用戶體驗
